message:
fix(style): replace incomplete stripAnsi with regex, remove dead code (gt-qecxc, gt-eedlh)

stripAnsi only matched 'm' as CSI terminator, missing other ANSI sequences
and eating remaining string if no 'm' found. Replace with compiled regex
matching all CSI sequences. Remove 11 unused exported functions from
style/table.go and ui/styles.go identified during code review.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
